component.name: hadoop-main
component.description: Apache Hadoop Main

component.name: hadoop-build-tools
component.description: Apache Hadoop Build Tools Project

component.name: hadoop-annotations
component.description: Apache Hadoop Annotations

component.name: hadoop-assemblies
component.description: Apache Hadoop Assemblies

component.name: maven-plugin-api
component.description: Maven is a project development management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: maven-model
component.description: Maven Model

component.name: maven-artifact
component.description: Maven is a project development management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: maven-core
component.description: Maven is a project development management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: maven-settings
component.description: Maven Settings

component.name: maven-settings-builder
component.description: Maven is a project development management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: maven-repository-metadata
component.description: Per-directory repository metadata.

component.name: maven-model-builder
component.description: Maven is a project development management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: maven-aether-provider
component.description: This module provides extensions to Aether for utilizing the Maven POM and Maven metadata.

component.name: aether-impl
component.description: An implementation of the repository system.

component.name: aether-spi
component.description: The service provider interface for repository system implementations and repository connectors.

component.name: aether-api
component.description: The application programming interface for the repository system.

component.name: aether-util
component.description: A collection of utility classes to ease usage of the repository system.

component.name: plexus-interpolation
component.description: The Plexus project provides a full software stack for creating and executing software projects.

component.name: plexus-utils
component.description: A collection of various utility classes to ease working with strings, files, command lines, XML and more.

component.name: plexus-classworlds
component.description: A class loader framework

component.name: plexus-component-annotations
component.description: Plexus Component "Java 5" Annotations, to describe plexus components properties in java sources with standard annotations instead of javadoc annotations.

component.name: maven-plugin-annotations
component.description: Java 5 annotations to use in Mojos

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson abstractions, basic JSON streaming API implementation

component.name: maven-shade-plugin
component.description: Repackages the project classes together with their dependencies into a single uber-jar, optionally renaming classes or removing unused classes.

component.name: maven-compat
component.description: Maven is a project development management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: wagon-provider-api
component.description: Maven Wagon API that defines the contract between different Wagon implementations

component.name: asm
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-commons
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-tree
component.description: A very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: jdom
component.description: JDOM is, quite simply, a Java representation of an XML document. JDOM provides a way to represent that document for easy and efficient reading, manipulation, and writing. It has a straightforward API, is a lightweight and fast, and is optimized for the Java programmer. It's an alternative to DOM and SAX, although it integrates well with both DOM and SAX.

component.name: guava
component.description:
Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, google's collections, io classes, and much much more.
This project is a complete packaging of all the Guava libraries into a single jar. Individual portions of Guava can be used by downloading the appropriate module and its dependencies.
Guava (complete) has only one code dependency - javax.annotation, per the JSR-305 spec.

component.name: jsr305
component.description: JSR305 Annotations for Findbugs

component.name: hadoop-minikdc
component.description: Apache Hadoop MiniKDC

component.name: kerb-simplekdc
component.description: Kerb Simple Kdc

component.name: kerb-client
component.description: Kerby-kerb Client

component.name: kerby-config
component.description: Kerby config library

component.name: kerb-core
component.description: Kerby-kerb core facilities

component.name: kerby-pkix
component.description: Kerby PKIX Project

component.name: kerby-asn1
component.description: Kerby ASN1 Project

component.name: kerby-util
component.description: Kerby common util, without any 3rd party dependency

component.name: kerb-common
component.description: Kerby-kerb Common facilities for both client and server

component.name: kerb-crypto
component.description: Kerby-kerb Crypto facility

component.name: kerb-util
component.description: Kerby-kerb Utilities

component.name: token-provider
component.description: Token provider project

component.name: nimbus-jose-jwt
component.description: Java library for Javascript Object Signing and Encryption (JOSE) and JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

component.name: jcip-annotations
component.description: A clean room implementation of the JCIP Annotations based entirely on the specification provided by the javadocs.

component.name: json-smart
component.description: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. It is easy for humans to read and write. It is easy for machines to parse and generate. It is based on a subset of the JavaScript Programming Language, Standard ECMA-262 3rd Edition - December 1999. JSON is a text format that is completely language independent but uses conventions that are familiar to programmers of the C-family of languages, including C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, Perl, Python, and many others. These properties make JSON an ideal data-interchange language.

component.name: accessors-smart
component.description: Java reflect give poor performance on getter setter an constructor calls, accessors-smart use ASM to speed up those calls.

component.name: kerb-admin
component.description: Kerby-kerb Admin facilities

component.name: kerb-server
component.description: Kerby-kerb Server

component.name: kerb-identity
component.description: Kerby-kerb Identity

component.name: kerby-xdr
component.description: Kerby XDR Project

component.name: slf4j-log4j12
component.description: SLF4J LOG4J-12 Binding

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: log4j
component.description: Apache Log4j 1.2

component.name: junit
component.description: JUnit is a regression testing framework written by Erich Gamma and Kent Beck. It is used by the developer who implements unit tests in Java.

component.name: hamcrest-core
component.description: This is the core API of hamcrest matcher framework to be used by third-party framework providers. This includes the a foundation set of matcher implementations for common operations.

component.name: hadoop-auth
component.description: Apache Hadoop Auth - Java HTTP SPNEGO

component.name: javax.servlet-api
component.description: Java.net - The Source for Java Technology Collaboration

component.name: commons-codec
component.description: The Apache Commons Codec package contains simple encoder and decoders for various formats such as Base64 and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

component.name: httpclient
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Client

component.name: httpcore
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Core (blocking I/O)

component.name: commons-logging
component.description: Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

component.name: netty
component.description: The Netty project is an effort to provide an asynchronous event-driven network application framework and tools for rapid development of maintainable high performance and high scalability protocol servers and clients. In other words, Netty is a NIO client server framework which enables quick and easy development of network applications such as protocol servers and clients. It greatly simplifies and streamlines network programming such as TCP and UDP socket server.

component.name: curator-framework
component.description: High-level API that greatly simplifies using ZooKeeper.

component.name: curator-client
component.description: Low-level API

component.name: hadoop-common
component.description: Apache Hadoop Common

component.name: commons-cli
component.description: Commons CLI provides a simple API for presenting, processing and validating a command line interface.

component.name: commons-math3
component.description: The Math project is a library of lightweight, self-contained mathematics and statistics components addressing the most common practical problems not immediately available in the Java programming language or commons-lang.

component.name: commons-net
component.description: Apache Commons Net library contains a collection of network utilities and protocol implementations. Supported protocols include: Echo, Finger, FTP, NNTP, NTP, POP3(S), SMTP(S), Telnet, Whois

component.name: commons-collections
component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: jetty-server
component.description: The core jetty server artifact.

component.name: jetty-http
component.description: Administrative parent pom for Jetty modules

component.name: jetty-io
component.description: Administrative parent pom for Jetty modules

component.description: Jax-RS provider for JSON content type, based on Jackson JSON processor's data binding functionality.

component.description: Extensions that provide interoperability support for Jackson JSON processor's data binding functionality.

component.name: jersey-server
component.description: Jersey is the open source (under dual CDDL+GPL license) JAX-RS (JSR 311) production quality Reference Implementation for building RESTful Web services.

component.name: commons-lang
component.description: Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: commons-beanutils
component.description: Apache Commons BeanUtils provides an easy-to-use but flexible wrapper around reflection and introspection.

component.name: commons-configuration2
component.description: Tools to assist in the reading of configuration/preferences files in various formats

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.description: Avro core components

component.name: paranamer
component.description: Paranamer allows runtime access to constructor and method parameter names for Java classes

component.name: snappy-java
component.description: snappy-java: A fast compression/decompression library

component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.name: protobuf-java
component.description: Protocol Buffers are a way of encoding structured data in an efficient yet extensible format.

component.name: gson
component.description: Google Gson library

component.name: jsch
component.description: JSch is a pure Java implementation of SSH2

component.name: curator-recipes
component.description: All of the recipes listed on the ZooKeeper recipes doc (except two phase commit).

component.name: htrace-core4
component.description: A distributed tracing framework.

component.name: commons-compress
component.description: Apache Commons Compress software defines an API for working with compression and archive formats. These include: bzip2, gzip, pack200, xz and ar, cpio, jar, tar, zip, dump.

component.name: xz
component.description: XZ data compression

component.name: stax2-api
component.description: tax2 API is an extension to basic Stax 1.0 API that adds significant new functionality, such as full-featured bi-direction validation interface and high-performance Typed Access API.

component.name: woodstox-core
component.description: Woodstox is a high-performance XML processor that implements Stax (JSR-173), SAX2 and Stax2 APIs

component.name: hadoop-nfs
component.description: Apache Hadoop NFS library

component.name: hadoop-kms
component.description: Apache Hadoop KMS

component.name: jul-to-slf4j
component.description: JUL to SLF4J bridge

component.name: metrics-core
component.description: Metrics is a Java library which gives you unparalleled insight into what your code does in production. Metrics provides a powerful toolkit of ways to measure the behavior of critical components in your production environment.

component.name: hadoop-hdfs-client
component.description: Apache Hadoop HDFS Client

component.name: okhttp
component.description: An HTTP+SPDY client for Android and Java applications

component.name: okio
component.description: A modern I/O API for Java

component.description: Apache Hadoop HDFS

component.name: jetty-util-ajax
component.description: JSON/Ajax Utility classes for Jetty

component.name: commons-daemon
component.description: Apache Commons Daemon software provides an alternative invocation mechanism for unix-daemon-like Java code.

component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: leveldbjni-all
component.description: An uber jar which contains all the leveldbjni platform libraries and dependencies

component.description: The javax.inject API

component.description: AOP Alliance

component.name: jersey-guice
component.description: Projects that provide additional functionality to jersey, like integration with other projects/frameworks.

component.name: jackson-module-jaxb-annotations
component.description: Support for using JAXB annotations as an alternative to "native" Jackson annotations, for configuring data binding.

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-json-provider
component.description: Functionality to handle JSON input/output for JAX-RS implementations (like Jersey and RESTeasy) using standard Jackson data binding.

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-base
component.description: Pile of code that is shared by all Jackson-based JAX-RS providers.

component.name: dnsjava
component.description: dnsjava is an implementation of DNS in Java. It supports all defined record types (including the DNSSEC types), and unknown types. It can be used for queries, zone transfers, and dynamic updates. It includes a cache which can be used by clients, and a minimal implementation of a server. It supports TSIG authenticated messages, partial DNSSEC verification, and EDNS0.

component.name: geronimo-jcache_1.0_spec
component.description: Apache Geronimo implementation of the JSR-107

component.publisher: Terracotta Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Software AG USA, Inc.
component.name: ehcache
component.description: End-user ehcache3 jar artifact

component.name: HikariCP-java7
component.description: Ultimate JDBC Connection Pool

component.name: mssql-jdbc
component.description: Microsoft JDBC Driver for SQL Server. The Azure Key Vault feature in Microsoft JDBC Driver for SQL Server depends on Azure SDK for JAVA and Azure Active Directory Library For Java.

component.name: objenesis
component.description: A library for instantiating Java objects

component.name: fst
component.description: A fast java serialization drop in-replacement and some serialization based utils such as Structs and OffHeap Memory.

component.name: java-util
component.description: Java Utilities

component.name: json-io
component.description: Java JSON serialization

component.name: commons-csv
component.description: The Apache Commons CSV library provides a simple interface for reading and writing CSV files of various types.

component.name: hbase-common
component.description: Common functionality for HBase

component.name: hbase-protocol
component.description: Protobuf protocol classes used by HBase to communicate.

component.name: hbase-annotations
component.description: Copy of Hadoop's annotations for HBase

component.name: htrace-core
component.description: A tracing framework for use with distributed systems written in java

component.name: findbugs-annotations
component.description: A clean room implementation of the Findbugs Annotations based entirely on the specification provided by the javadocs and at http://findbugs.sourceforge.net/manual/annotations.html.

component.name: hbase-client
component.description: Client of HBase

component.name: jcodings
component.description: Byte based encoding support library for java

component.name: joni
component.description: Java port of Oniguruma: http://www.geocities.jp/kosako3/oniguruma that uses byte arrays directly instead of java Strings and chars

component.name: metrics-core
component.description: Yammer's Metrics library.

component.name: hbase-server
component.description: Main functionality for HBase

component.name: hbase-procedure
component.description: Procedure Framework

component.name: hbase-prefix-tree
component.description: Prefix Tree Data Block Encoder

component.name: commons-httpclient
component.description: The HttpClient component supports the client-side of RFC 1945 (HTTP/1.0) and RFC 2616 (HTTP/1.1) , several related specifications (RFC 2109 (Cookies) , RFC 2617 (HTTP Authentication) , etc.), and provides a framework by which new request types (methods) or HTTP extensions can be created easily.

component.name: hbase-hadoop-compat
component.description: Interfaces to be implemented in order to smooth over hadoop version differences

component.name: hbase-hadoop2-compat
component.description: Interfaces to be implemented in order to smooth over hadoop version differences

component.name: commons-math
component.description: The Math project is a library of lightweight, self-contained mathematics and statistics components addressing the most common practical problems not immediately available in the Java programming language or commons-lang.

component.description: JSP2.1 Jasper implementation from Glassfish

component.name: jsp-api-2.1
component.description: JSP2.1 API

component.name: servlet-api-2.5
component.description: Servlet Specification 2.5 API

component.name: jasper-compiler
component.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

component.name: jasper-runtime
component.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

component.description: JSP 2.0 Expression Language Interpreter Implementation

component.description: Jamon runtime support classes

component.description: Disruptor - Concurrent Programming Framework

component.description: Apache Hadoop Mini-Cluster

component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.description: Apache Hadoop MapReduce Examples

component.description: HSQLDB - Lightweight 100% Java SQL Database Engine

component.name: hadoop-openstack
component.description: This module contains code to support integration with OpenStack. Currently this consists of a filesystem client to read data from and write data to an OpenStack Swift object store.

component.name: hadoop-aws
component.description: This module contains code to support integration with Amazon Web Services. It also declares the dependencies needed to work with AWS services.

component.name: aws-java-sdk-bundle
component.description: A single bundled dependency that includes all service and dependent JARs with third-party libraries relocated to different namespaces.

component.name: hadoop-kafka
component.description: This module contains code to support integration with Kafka. It also declares the dependencies needed to work with Kafka.

component.name: lz4
component.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

component.name: hadoop-azure
component.description: This module contains code to support integration with Azure. Currently this consists of a filesystem client to read data from and write data to Azure Storage.

component.name: azure-storage
component.description: SDK for Microsoft Azure Storage Clients

component.name: azure-keyvault-core
component.description: This package contains Microsoft Azure Key Vault Core SDK.

component.name: aliyun-sdk-oss
component.description: The Aliyun OSS SDK for Java used for accessing Aliyun Object Storage Service

component.name: hadoop-client
component.description: Apache Hadoop Client aggregation pom with dependencies exposed

component.name: hadoop-sls
component.description: Apache Hadoop Scheduler Load Simulator

component.name: ojalgo
component.description: oj! Algorithms - ojAlgo - is Open Source Java code that has to do with mathematics, linear algebra and optimisation.

component.name: hadoop-azure-datalake
component.description: This module contains code to support integration with Azure Data Lake.
